title: Mild Malaysian Tempeh Salad
description: A fresh, post-workout salad featuring aerated tempeh, dried apricots and a citrusy coconut aminos dressing, perfect for a shojin-friendly meal.
instructions: Marinate the diced tempeh in coconut aminos, lime juice, sesame oil, pepper, and a pinch of salt for 10 minutes.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat and sauté the marinated tempeh until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
In a bowl, combine the sautéed tempeh, diced cucumber, sliced red onion, chopped mint, cilantro, and chopped dried apricots.
Whisk lime juice and a splash of coconut aminos to create a light dressing and drizzle over the salad.
Toss gently to coat all the ingredients evenly.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds on top for a nutty crunch.
Let the salad rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve chilled or at room temperature as a refreshing post-workout meal.
